debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
m R : NNReal
hr : R ≠ 0
⊢ centerOfMass (RigidBody.solidSphere d.succ m R) = 0

failed_attempts:
rw [centerOfMass]
  simp only [solidSphere, smul_eq_mul, ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk]
  have : ∫ (x : Space d.succ) in Metric.closedBall 0 R, x ∂volume = 0 := by
    apply eq_zero_of_neg_eq
    have h_meas : (volume.restrict (Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R)).map Neg.neg =
        volume.restrict (Metric.closedBall 0 R) := by
      rw [Measure.map_restrict (MeasurableEquiv.neg _).measurable (MeasurableEquiv.neg _).injective]
      simp only [Measure.map_neg_eq_self]
      congr
      ext
      simp [Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right, norm_neg]
    rw [← h_meas, integral_map measurable_neg.aemeasurable measurable_id.aemeasurable]
    simp
  rw [this, smul_zero]

rw [centerOfMass]
  ext i
  simp only [solidSphere, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
  apply mul_eq_zero_of_right
  set I := ∫ (x : Space d.succ) in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, x i
  have hI : I = - I := by
    rw [← (measurePreserving_neg (μ := volume)).integral_comp (Equiv.neg (Space d.succ)) measurableSet_closedBall]
    have h_dom : (Equiv.neg (Space d.succ)) ⁻¹' Metric.closedBall 0 R = Metric.closedBall 0 R := by
      ext; simp [Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right, norm_neg]
    rw [h_dom]
    simp only [Equiv.neg_apply, Pi.neg_apply, integral_neg]
  rw [eq_neg_iff_add_eq_zero, ← two_mul] at hI
  exact (mul_eq_zero.mp hI).resolve_left (by norm_num)

  suffices ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, x i ∂volume = 0 by simp [this]
  let S := Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R
  let μ := volume.restrict S
  have h_map : μ.map Neg.neg = μ := by
    rw [Measure.restrict_map_neg, Measure.map_neg_eq_self volume]
    · congr; ext; simp [S, Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right, norm_neg]
    · exact MeasurableSet.neg Metric.isClosed_ball.measurableSet
  have : ∫ x, x i ∂μ = - ∫ x, x i ∂μ := by
    rw [← h_map, integral_map (MeasurableEquiv.neg (Space d.succ)).measurableEmbedding]
    simp
  linarith

simp only [centerOfMass, solidSphere, solidSphere_mass m R hr]
  simp only [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk]
  let s := Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R
  have h_int : ∫ x in s, x = 0 := by
    let μ := volume.restrict s
    have h_map : μ.map Neg.neg = μ := by
      rw [Measure.map_restrict measurableEmbedding_neg.measurable measurableSet_closedBall]
      simp only [measure_preserving_neg (μ := volume).map_eq]
      congr 1
      ext x
      simp [s, Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right]
    have : ∫ x, x ∂μ = ∫ x, -x ∂μ := by
      nth_rw 1 [← h_map]
      rw [integral_map (Measurable.neg measurable_id).aemeasurable measurableEmbedding_neg.measurable]
      simp
    rw [integral_neg, eq_neg_iff_add_eq_zero, ← two_smul] at this
    exact smul_eq_zero.mp this |>.resolve_left (by norm_num)
  rw [h_int, smul_zero, smul_zero]

simp only [centerOfMass, solidSphere]
  suffices ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, (x : Space d.succ) = 0 by
    simp [this]
  let s := Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R
  let L := LinearIsometryEquiv.neg ℝ (Space d.succ)
  have h_symm : Set.image L s = s := by
    rw [Set.image_equiv_eq_preimage_symm]
    ext x
    simp only [s, L, LinearIsometryEquiv.neg_symm, LinearIsometryEquiv.neg_apply,
      Set.mem_preimage, Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right, norm_neg]
  have h_int : ∫ x in s, (x : Space d.succ) = ∫ x in s, L x := by
    let μ := volume.restrict s
    have : Measure.map L μ = μ := by
      rw [Measure.map_restrict L.continuous.measurable L.injective]
      rw [Measure.map_linearIsometryEquiv L volume]
      rw [h_symm]
    rw [← this, integral_map L.continuous.aemeasurable continuous_id.aestronglyMeasurable]
    rfl
  simp only [L, LinearIsometryEquiv.neg_apply, integral_neg] at h_int
  rwa [eq_neg_self_iff] at h_int

ext i
  simp only [centerOfMass, solidSphere, mass, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_eq_mul, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
  have : ∫ x in Metric.closedBall (0 : Space d.succ) R, x i ∂volume = 0 := by
    apply eq_zero_of_neg_eq
    rw [integral_neg_eq_self (fun (x : Space d.succ) => x i)
      (volume.restrict (Metric.closedBall 0 R))]
    rw [Measure.restrict_map_neg Metric.isClosed_closedBall.measurableSet]
    · simp only [Pi.neg_apply, integral_neg]
      rw [Measure.map_neg_eq_self volume]
      congr
      ext; simp [Metric.mem_closedBall, dist_zero_right, norm_neg]
  rw [this]
  simp

simp only [centerOfMass, solidSphere, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk,
    ContMDiffMap.coeFn_mk, smul_eq_mul]
  apply mul_eq_zero_of_right
